name: Nikon Z7 II Mirrorless Camera
description: Improved processing, greater versatility, but familiar in design, the Nikon Z7 II takes everything that was great from the original and ups its capabilities even more. Sporting a high-resolution 45.7MP FX-format BSI CMOS sensor and dual EXPEED 6 image processors.

features.Key Features:: 45.7MP FX-Format BSI CMOS Sensor | Dual EXPEED 6 Image Processors | UHD 4K60 Video; N-Log & 10-Bit HDMI Out | 10 fps Cont. Shooting, ISO 64-25600 | 493-Point Phase-Detect AF System | 3.6m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3.2" 2.1m-Dot Tilting Touchscreen LCD | 5-Axis In-Body Vibration Reduction | Dual Memory Card Slots | NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/4 S Lens
features.What's In The Box?: Nikon EN-EL15c Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery | Nikon MH-25a Battery Charger | Nikon UC-E24 USB Cable | HDMI/USB Cable Clip | Nikon BS-1 Accessory Shoe Cap | Nikon AN-DC19 Camera Strap | Nikon BF-N1 Body Cap | Nikon DK-29 Rubber Eyecup
